title: helichrysum dregeanum
intro: Helichrysum dregeanum, also known as Yellow Cushion or Yellow Everlasting, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum dregeanum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
